/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/chess.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/chess.dir/chess_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/dialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chess.dir/src/boardscanner.cpp.o -o chess  /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.15 /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.15 /usr/local/lib/libbcm2835.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.15
